footer.tagline: The first sentiment-aware travel discovery engine. Powered by public signals, curated by the crowd, mapped for you.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1body: By accessing or using findy.place ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.
terms.s2body: findy.place is a discovery platform that aggregates publicly available content from social media (TikTok, Instagram) to surface trending places in El Salvador. We do not own, control, or endorse any third-party content displayed on the platform.
terms.s3body: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activity under your account. You must be at least 13 years old to use the Service.
terms.s4body: You agree not to misuse the Service. Prohibited activities include: scraping or harvesting data without permission, posting illegal or harmful content, attempting to gain unauthorized access to any system, or using the Service to violate any applicable law.
terms.s5body: All original content, branding, and features of findy.place are the exclusive property of findy.place and its creators. Third-party content remains the property of its respective owners.
terms.s6body: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or availability of any information displayed on the platform.
terms.s7body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, findy.place shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service.
terms.s8body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
terms.s9body: For any questions about these Terms, please contact us at legal@findy.place.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At findy.place, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights as a user.
privacy.s1body: We collect information you provide directly (name, email, password when you register), information generated by your use of the Service (searches, clicks, saved places), and publicly available social media content (TikTok/Instagram posts) processed to power our discovery engine.
privacy.s2body: We use your information to: provide and improve the Service, personalise your experience, send you relevant notifications (only with your consent), analyse usage patterns to enhance performance, and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.s3body: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with trusted third-party service providers (such as cloud hosting, analytics) strictly for operating the Service. All providers are required to protect your data under confidentiality agreements.
privacy.s4body: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in and remember your preferences. We may use analytics cookies to understand how users interact with the Service. You can disable non-essential cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.s5body: We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting us.
privacy.s6body: Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data; object to or restrict processing; and request data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@findy.place.
privacy.s7body: We implement industry-standard security measures including encrypted connections (HTTPS), hashed passwords, and access controls. No method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure; we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s8body: The Service is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us immediately.
privacy.s9body: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify registered users of material changes via email or an in-app notice.
privacy.s10body: For privacy-related questions, contact us at privacy@findy.place.
